name: Ravioli with Ricotta Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the sifted flour and salt. Make a well in the center.
2. Add the eggs one at a time to the flour mixture, mixing slightly after each addition.
3. Gradually add about 6 tablespoons very cold water to the flour and egg mixture.
4. Mix until a stiff dough forms. Turn onto a lightly floured surface and knead for 3-5 minutes until smooth and elastic.
5. Divide the dough into four portions. Roll each portion out to an thickness of 1/8 inch, then cut lengthwise into 5-inch wide strips.
6. In a large bowl, combine the filling ingredients: ricotta cheese, salt, pepper, parsley, Parmesan cheese, and beaten eggs.
7. Place about 2 teaspoons of the filling 1.5 inches from the narrow end and in the center of each strip.
8. Continue along the strip, placing the filling at intervals of about 3.5 inches.
9. Fold the strip lengthwise to cover the mounds of filling.
10. Press the edges together with the tines of a fork to seal.
11. Place the ravioli in a large saucepan of boiling water and salted water (2 tablespoons).
12. Boil the ravioli rapidly, uncovered, for about 20 minutes or until tender.
13. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain.
14. Serve immediately on a warmed platter, topped with tomato sauce and grated Romano or Parmesan cheese.
Makes about 3 dozen raviolis.
